items.caption: A close-up of a champagne cork with a distinct mark resembling the shape of el salvador. in the background, there is a bottle of champagne with a green label, partially visible. the cork is in sharp focus, highlighting its texture and the unique mark, while the bottle is out of focus, providing a contrasting background. the image has a watermark with the text "© eyeagleb esy-051996833 - easyfotostock," indicating the source and reference number of the image.
